payload.label: side table
payload.long_description: Dark brown wooden side table with a rectangular top and lower shelf holding a wicker basket, topped with small decorative items (plant leaves, white saucer, remote); glossy wood finish with minor wear, partially edge-cropped in the image and appearing about 0.8 m from the camera.
attributes: decorative items on top (plant, saucer, remote)
